text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Trainer! Ya got the magic touch!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, I think I picked up a thing or two watchin'
from the sidelines. I dunno if I can get that claw
lined up as good as you though!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey. Ya gotta do that in front of my siblin's
some time. They won't believe what they're seein'!
